Master of Technology (M.Tech) Electronics and Communication Engineering (VLSI Design and Technology) Course, Eligibility, Fee, Curriculum | Bennett University International Admissions Research Alumni Career Online Payment Library Student-Faculty Login M.Tech Electronics and Communication Engineering ( VLSI Design & Technology ) Apply Now M.Tech Electronics and Communication Engineering ( VLSI Design & Technology ) Apply Now About M.Tech Electronics and Communication Engineering (VLSI Design and Technology) The Master in Technology (M.Tech) Electronics and Communication Engineering VLSI Design and Technology is a two-year postgraduate program focused on advanced training in semiconductor design, verification, and fabrication. The program bridges academic research and industry practices in Very-Large-Scale Integration (VLSI) design. Students gain expertise in analogue and digital IC design, device modeling, and SoC development using industry-standard EDA tools. With a strong emphasis on project-based and research-driven learning, this program prepares graduates to take leadership roles in the semiconductor ecosystem, R&D, and academia. Duration 2 Years Specialisations NA Credits 68 Start Date July 2026 Curriculum Highlights Advanced courses in CMOS design, SoC development, and semiconductor device physics. Emphasis on project-based and research-driven learning. Practical sessions with industry-standard EDA tools. Thesis/dissertation component in final year. Why M.Tech Electronics and Communication (VLSI Design and Technology) from Bennett University Our program is designed to equip students with a comprehensive understanding of semiconductors to excel in the industry and academic landscape. Research-Oriented Learning: Emphasises innovation, problem-solving, and thesis-driven research in chip design and semiconductor fabrication. Hands-on EDA Experience: Training with Cadence, Synopsys, Mentor Graphics, and FPGA-based design systems. Semiconductor Mission Alignment: Supports India’s Design Linked Incentive (DLI) and Semiconductor Mission goals. Diverse Career Pathways: Prepares students for roles in IC design, verification, fabrication, as well as academia and research. M.Tech Electronics and Communication (VLSI Design and Technology) Program Fee Get detailed information about the M.Tech Electronics and Communication Engineering (VLSI Design and Technology) program fee structure, including tuition, hostel fee, and other applicable charges. Click here for details. Program Objectives The M.Tech program aims to produce professionals with deep knowledge of semiconductor devices, advanced IC design, and system-on-chip integration. It focuses on cultivating research acumen, design innovation, and technical leadership required in the semiconductor industry and academia. Learning Outcomes Upon completion, students will be able to: Design and analyse complex analogue, digital, and mixed-signal ICs. Apply VLSI design methodologies using EDA tools for chip-level integration. Conduct independent research in semiconductor technology and microelectronics. Contribute to India’s semiconductor ecosystem through innovation and entrepreneurship. Career Pathways On completing the M.Tech VLSI Design and Technology program, graduates can pursue careers in semiconductor design, verification, and R&D. Typical roles that currently exist in the industry are VLSI Design Engineer, SoC / FPGA Engineer, Verification & Validation Engineer, Physical Design Engineer, EDA Tool Developer, and Research Scientist or Faculty Member, among others. Leading employers in the domain include Intel, Qualcomm, Micron, AMD, Synopsys, Cadence, MediaTek, and L&T Technology Services, Renesas, S.T. Microelectronics. Eligibility Criteria Indian Nationals: Bachelor’s degree in Engineering / Technology / Architecture or equivalent of MCA/ MIT / MSc with minimum 50% marks with English as medium of instruction. NRIs: Applicants must have completed Grade 12 / A Level or an equivalent qualification with a minimum of 50% aggregate marks and must also meet the English Language Requirement (ELR). Selection Process Selection will be based on Aggregate Graduation Percentage. Faculty Prof. N. Latha Ph.D. - IIT, Delhi Dr. Ajay Yadav Ph.D. - IIT Delhi Dr. Rahul Mukherjee Ph.D. - IIT Kharagpur Dr. Ankit Kumar Pandey Ph.D. - NIT, Delhi Dr. Rohan Katti Ph.D - SRM Institute of Science and Technology Dr. Mahesh Kumawat Ph.D. IIT Indore Dr. Priyanka Mathur Ph.D. - Shiv Nadar Institute of Eminence, Greater Noida Dr. Mohammed Usman Ph.D. - University of Strathclyde, Glasgow, United Kingdom Dr. Umesh Sharma Post-Doctoral - IIT, Delhi Dr. Anil Rajput Post-Doctoral Fellow - IIT, Dhanbad Dr. Ashima Sharma Ph.D - NIT, Delhi Dr. Ashish Maurya Ph.D.- IIT, Dhanbad OUR ASK M.Tech Electronics and Communication Engineering (VLSI Design and Technology) Program Frequently Asked Questions What is the duration and structure of M.Tech VLSI Design program at Bennett University? The program spans two years (four semesters) with coursework, electives, and a thesis/dissertation component. Which EDA tools are used for practical training in the Master program in VLSI Design and Technology? Students work with industry-grade tools such as Cadence Virtuoso, Synopsys PrimeTime, Mentor Graphics ModelSim, and Xilinx Vivado. What research opportunities are available for M.Tech VLSI Design students? Students undertake independent research projects and a thesis focusing on semiconductor design, verification, or fabrication. What are the higher education or research prospects after pursuing M.Tech in VLSI Design and Technology? Graduates are well-prepared for Ph.D. programs in VLSI Design, Microelectronics, or Embedded Systems at Bennett University, IITs, NITs, IIITs and international universities. The programme emphasizes on the creation of diverse multimedia content using advanced AI-integrated tools and learn the art and craft of television and broadcast production. Its core is practical hands-on training, ensuring students gain valuable real-world experience. Courses will be taught by award-winning industry professionals with an unrivalled approach to hands-on, interactive learning in a real-world environment. The comprehensive approach ensures that students are well-prepared to navigate and succeed in the dynamic field of digital media. School of Engineering And Applied Sciences - Bennett University International Admissions Research Alumni Career Online Payment Library Student-Faculty Login Engineering and Applied Sciences Bennett University Today’s engineers must be citizens of the world. In the School of Engineering & Applied Sciences (SEAS), we are committed to developing global, multi-cultural and multifaceted engineers, who can operate across borders and boundaries. This is demonstrated by our curriculum and in the faculty, staff, and students we are striving to attract. SEAS at Bennett University is creating future ready professionals to inspire and transform the world with the best solutions to the technical issues. The School of Engineering and Applied Sciences comprises four departments: Electronics and Communication Engineering, Biotechnology, Mechanical Engineering, and Physics. SEAS provides not only fundamental knowledge of science and engineering, but also a strong and diligent understanding of research and development to provide complete solutions to technical and scientific problems. Dean’s Message Prof. (Dr.) N. Latha Dean - School of Engineering & Applied Sciences (SEAS) On behalf of faculty, staff, and students, I welcome you to the School of Engineering & Applied Sciences (SEAS) at Bennett University. The School of Engineering & Applied Science houses four departments: Electronics and Communication Engineering (ECE), Biotechnology (BIOTECH) Mechanical Engineering (ME) and Physics (PHY). Read More × Prof. (Dr.) N. Latha Dean - School of Engineering & Applied Sciences (SEAS) The School of Engineering & Applied Sciences is an exciting place to be as it provides an environment that encourages the holistic development of a student and help transform students into lifelong learners with the ability to thrive in an ever-changing world. The school offers undergraduate, post graduate and doctoral level programs. The programs aim to blend rigorous academic instruction with real-world experiential learning. Whether you are interested in Mechanical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Electronics Engineering and Computing, Engineering Physics or Biotechnology, our programs equip students with the knowledge and skills needed to excel in their chosen field. We emphasize to integrate classroom learning, internships, and experiential projects, we emphasize learnability in the curriculum ensuring that our students are well-prepared to adapt to new challenges and opportunities in their chosen careers. We believe in imparting pedagogical method to cater to student inclusivity and diversity. Students are also provided with an option to choose specialization courses in all our undergraduate programs offered by the school. The specialization courses are designed to develop skill set as per the current research trends and Industry requirements. Curriculum is tailored and periodically reviewed based on student feedbacks, faculty, alumni and experts from both Academia and Industry. All faculty are PhD holders from reputed Institutes in India and abroad and possess post-doctoral experience from some of the best Universities abroad. The School of Engineering & Applied Sciences (SEAS) at Bennett University remains at the forefront of innovation and cutting-edge research. Our faculty, serve in prominent leadership and editorial positions, and pursue impactful research with an interdisciplinary focus to address the complex challenges facing society today. This spirit of inquiry and exploration translates directly into the classroom, enriching our students' learning experiences and preparing them to be ethical problem solvers. The faculty has been sanctioned extramural grants from funding agencies. Besides teaching & research, most of the faculty in SEAS also supervise and mentor PhD scholars registered at the University. The Centre of Excellence (CoE) in Nanosensors and Nanomedicine under SEAS is a collaborative effort by all four departments that aims to foster interdisciplinary, cutting-edge research towards developing diagnostic and therapeutics in nanoscale for the healthcare sector and nanosensors for industrial purposes. We are proud of our alumni who have moved to institutes of high repute both in India & abroad for their higher studies. To name a few like IITs, IISERs, CSIR-IGIB, IISER Kolkata, BITS Pilani, University of Heidelberg, New York University, NorthEastern University, University of Oxford, University of Glasgow, Monash University, University Leipzig, Albert-Ludwigs Universitat Frieberg, University of Cologne. We welcome you to be part of SEAS family as a prospective student, current student, an alumnus, academic partner, or industry collaborator. I encourage you to visit webpages of individual departments to learn more about the impressive work of our faculty, students, and alumni. Departments Electronics and Communications Engineering Mechanical Engineering Physics Biotechnology Electronics and Communications Engineering Electronics and Communication Engineering is one of the most diverse technological fields in the world. The Department of Engineering and Applied Sciences at Bennett University offers B.Tech in Electronics and Communication Engineering, B.Tech Electronics and Computer Engineering, and Ph.D programs. The SEAS provides unique opportunities in the field of research and development. The school covers the broadest areas in research. In tune with the academic philosophy of the University, the Department's curricula for the undergraduate and postgraduate programs aim at producing high-quality engineers in the area of Electronics & Communication who can take up challenges in design, development, research and manufacturing in areas such as the Internet of Things, 5G & Beyond, and Information Processing & Analytics. Students shall undertake courses in Basic Sciences, Mathematics, Basic Engineering as well as in core subjects of Electronics & Communication Engineering (ECE). They would be supported by laboratory facilities. All laboratories are equipped with state of the art instruments and software tools to enable students to perform design-oriented experiments and test their designs by simulation in research areas of Nanotechnology, VLSI Design & VLSI Signal Processing, Signal Processing for Information, Antenna and Microwave for 5G and above. Know More Courses BTech Electronics and Communications Engineering B.Tech Electronics and Computer Engineering Ph.D. in ECE Mechanical Engineering Mechanical Engineering is one of the most diversified traditional engineering domains. These engineers are trained to design and build machines & devices, make manual working ways easy and enhance work productivity. These machines extend the work capability and raise the standard of living. These engineers design and build machines to make normal human work easy with improved efficiency. In a way, Mechanical Engineers are involved in creating the future. They are the driving force behind many of the technologies and industrial processes in our modern world. Mechanical Engineering will be offered to train manpower with quality education in manufacturing, design, automation and thermal sciences. Students will have adequate flexibility to specialise in areas of their choice through the selection of electives and projects. The course will be designed to provide students with adequate exposure for hands-on experience in practice and design. It will emphasise on subjects like Flexible Manufacturing Systems, Computer Integrated Manufacturing, Robotics, Tribology, Composites and Laser Materials, Energy Engineering, Finite Element Methods etc to provide them to take up positions in manufacturing, design, energy generation and conservation and R&D. Know More Courses BTech in Mechanical Engineering Ph.D. in Mechanical Mathematics The role and use of mathematics have increased manifold in the past decade with the onset of the information revolution that has impacted several other disciplines as well. This has put additional expectations on mathematics from the point of view of teaching, research and applications. Skills in computational mathematics are needed more than ever before. Keeping this in mind a number of new courses (core as well as elective) have been designed and introduced at the undergraduate and postgraduate levels. The Department will also cater to the basic needs of various undergraduate and postgraduate programs in Engineering. Know More Courses Ph.D. in Mathematics Physics Established in 2016, the department has acheeved excellence in teaching and research. The department currently offers both academic programs at the undergraduate and postgraduate level. The academic programs include Engineering Physics through JEE Main and Ph.D. In addition, the department offers basic and topical courses for the entire student community of Bennett University. With eight faculty members, and several post-doctoral researchers, the department has a very vibrant interdisciplinary research environment. The areas of research interests and expertise spans a wide range including Biophysics, Condensed Matter Physics, Non-linear Dynamics and Hydrodynamics, Optics and Photonics, and Statistical Physics, covering both theoretical and experimental aspects. The faculty members of the department are also involved in several sponsored research and industrial consultancy projects. Browse our website to know more about various academic programs, research interests of the individual faculty members and the ongoing research projects. Please feel free to contact us for more information. Know More Courses B.Tech in Engineering Physics Ph.D in Physics Chemistry The Department of Chemistry is currently involved in promoting education and research in the interface of chemistry, biology, and material science. This involves coursework such as introductory chemistry and biology for engineers (ECHE102L), chemistry of bio molecules (EBTY103L). The research involves providing cost effective methods of biological detection, such as pathogen detection, sequencing, and biomedical device engineering. The research and teaching involve heavy degree of collaboration and consultation with faculties from Physics, Biotechnology, and ECE. Know More Courses PhD in Chemistry Biotechnology The importance of studying Biotechnology reflects on myriad fields, namely, environment, healthcare, agriculture and so on. To lead to a scientific breakthrough, Biotechnology has an immense impact in the private and public sectors; and innovations are one such component that drives the industry The Department of Biotechnology in Bennett University stands out with varied specialisations which is imperative in today’s world of innovation. We started our journey in the year 2016. Over the past five years we have grown our expertise and competence in the core Mechanical Engineering curriculum and research. We offer a strong undergraduate programme in Mechanical Engineering, whereas, at the post graduate level, we offer Ph.D degrees. Several sponsored candidates from industries carry out their postgraduate studies in our department. Our department offers science-based engineering curriculum, emphasises to impart technical knowledge to students to make them proficient in solving engineering problems. The department offers large number of elective courses for providing wide spectrum of options to the students to pursue their interest in aerospace engineering, biomechanics, robotics and automation, advanced materials and manufacturing techniques, computer aided modelling & simulation studies and energy systems engineering. The course contents are periodically updated for introducing new scientific and technological developments. Undergraduate students are encouraged to undertake various research projects, as well as live projects with industries, to give them exposure to industrial environment and working ethics. Since, industrial internships and R&D projects are an integral part of B. Tech ME curriculum. Our Department maintains active research groups for carrying out collaborative and interdisciplinary research. We have state-of-the-art research facilities to support our academic programmes and research. Our faculty members have excellent academic credentials; and are members of editorial boards of national and international journals. They review technical articles for journals on a regular basis and organise international symposia and conferences. We are extremely confident that in years to come, ME Department, with its industry curriculum, as well as active industrial and interdisciplinary research collaborations, will strengthen and enforce the reputation of itself as well as of Bennett University, as an enviable platform for higher education! MBA (Entrepreneurship & Family Business) | Bennett University International Admissions Research Alumni Career Online Payment Library Student-Faculty Login MBA Entrepreneurship Family Business Apply Now MBA Entrepreneurship Family Business Apply Now About MBA Entrepreneurship & Family Business The MBA in Entrepreneurship & Family Business is a two-year postgraduate program designed for aspiring entrepreneurs and next-generation family business leaders who seek to build, scale, and sustain successful ventures in a dynamic and competitive global environment. This program uniquely blends entrepreneurial innovation with family enterprise management. Students gain a strong foundation in venture creation, business strategy, governance, succession planning, and digital transformation. Through immersive and experiential learning, learners develop the mindset, skills, and leadership capabilities required to launch startups, transform legacy businesses, and drive sustainable growth across industries. Duration 2 Years Specialisations NA Credits - Start Date July 2026 Curriculum Highlights The curriculum offers a blend of entrepreneurship fundamentals, family business management, and advanced growth strategies. It equips students with the knowledge and skills required to manage startups as well as legacy enterprises. Core Courses Entrepreneurship & New Venture Creation Family Business Management Business Strategy for Entrepreneurs Entrepreneurial Finance & Financial Planning Innovation & Design Thinking Electives Entrepreneurial Marketing & Branding Scaling Up a Venture Negotiation & Conflict Resolution Taxation and Legal Issues for Family Businesses Private Equity, Venture Capital & Mergers and Acquisitions Innovation & Business Model Design Startup Valuation & Fundraising Strategies Social & Sustainable Entrepreneurship Risk Management & Crisis Leadership for Entrepreneurs Technology & Platform-Based Business Models Experiential Learning Startup ideation labs and business model development workshops Live consulting projects with startups and family-owned enterprises Business plan competitions and pitch events are evaluated by investors Incubation support through university startup cells and innovation hubs Mentorship sessions with entrepreneurs, family business leaders, and venture capitalists Field visits to startups, incubators, and innovation clusters Why an MBA (Entrepreneurship & Family Business) from Bennett University Venture Creation in Action: Learn by doing, students ideate, prototype, validate, and pitch viable business ventures through structured entrepreneurial platforms. Family Business Excellence: Develop expertise in family governance, succession planning, leadership transition, and professionalisation of family enterprises. Experiential & Immersive Pedagogy: Engage in live consulting projects, startup simulations, business model competitions, and real-world case studies. Startup Incubation & Funding Support: Access university incubation centres, investor networks, and seed-stage mentoring to convert ideas into ventures. Mentorship by Practitioners: Learn directly from successful entrepreneurs, investors, and family business owners through masterclasses. Global Entrepreneurial Exposure: Gain insights into global innovation ecosystems, emerging markets, and international entrepreneurship practices. Program Objectives The program aims to develop entrepreneurial and leadership capabilities to create scalable ventures while strengthening the understanding of governance and innovation in family-run enterprises. It equips students with strategic, financial, and digital tools for venture growth and promotes ethical, impact-driven entrepreneurship. Learning Outcomes MBA in Entrepreneurship & Family Business students will: Learn to conceptualise, design, and launch innovative startups and business models, while also leading transformation and succession initiatives in family-owned enterprises. Apply design thinking, digital tools, and data-driven insights to make informed entrepreneurial decisions, build strategic partnerships, and attract funding from angel investors and venture capitalists. Demonstrate ethical, global, and sustainable leadership within diverse entrepreneurial ecosystems. Career Pathways Graduates of the MBA in Entrepreneurship & Family Business are equipped to create their own ventures, transform family enterprises, and take on strategic leadership roles across industries. The specialisation prepares students for both entrepreneurial careers and high-impact managerial roles. Entrepreneurial & Venture-Focused Roles Startup Founder / Co-founder Entrepreneur-in-Residence Business Owner / Family Business Leader Social Entrepreneur Franchise Owner / Business Expansion Lead Family Business & Leadership Roles Next-Generation Family Business Leader Family Business Strategy Manager Succession Planning & Governance Advisor Business Transformation Lead Operations & Growth Manager Eligibility Criteria Indian Nationals: Passed Graduation in any discipline from a recognised university with a minimum 50% marks with English as the medium of instruction NRI: For international applicants, a minimum of 50% in the qualifying examination is required, along with having studied the prerequisite subjects for admission to the desired program. Selection Process Selection will be based on the weighted score of CAT / XAT / NMAT / MAT / CMAT / GMAT / BU MAT/ CUET Percentile score & Graduation & Personal Interview. MBA Program Fee Get detailed information about the MBA in Entrepreneurship & Family Business program fee structure, including tuition, hostel fee, and other applicable charges. Click here for details. IIT, Delhi Dr. Laxmi Gupta Ph.D. - IIT, Delhi Dr. Neha Zaidi Ph.D. - Aligarh Muslim University Dr. Ahammed Junaid FPM - MICA, Ahmedabad Ms. Anu Mohta Ph.d.(Thesis Submitted) - BHU Dr. Saad Ashraf Ph.D. - FMS, University of Delhi Dr. Ratan Kumar FPM - Management Development Institute, Gurgaon Mr. Krishan Ph.D. (Pursuing) - JNU, Delhi Dr. Vijay Prakash Mishra Ph.D. - Gokhale Institute of Politics and Economics, Pune Mr. Abhishek Saran Ph.D.(Pursuing) - IIM, Sambalpur Ms. Priya Mandleshwar Ph.D. (Pursuing) - IIM, Indore Ms. Rimleena Boro Ph.D. (Pursuing) - IIM, Indore OUR ASK MBA (Entrepreneurship & Family Business) Frequently Asked Questions Who should apply for this MBA (Entrepreneurship & Family Business) program? The MBA in Entrepreneurship & Family Business is ideal for aspiring entrepreneurs who want to start their own ventures, as well as individuals from business families looking to take over, scale, or professionalise their family enterprises. Do I need a business background to apply in MBA (Entrepreneurship & Family Business)? No, a business or commerce background is not mandatory. While it can be helpful, this MBA program is designed to build entrepreneurial and management fundamentals from the ground up. Students from Engineering, Arts, Science, and other disciplines with an entrepreneurial mindset are encouraged to apply. Does the MBA in Entrepreneurship & Family Business prepare me to launch a startup? Yes. Additionally, Bennett University offers a strong startup ecosystem through incubation centres, dedicated Hatchery labs, mentorship from industry experts, and opportunities to pitch startup ideas to investors for seed funding and early-stage support. What is the focus of the Family Business component of the MBA curriculum? The Family Business curriculum of the MBA focuses on managing the unique dynamics of family-owned enterprises. Key areas include professionalisation while preserving family values, conflict management, succession planning, governance structures, and innovation in legacy businesses. Will I get practical, hands-on experience in this MBA program? Yes, the program in MBA (Entrepreneurship & Family Business) is highly experiential. It includes startup ideation labs, live projects with existing family businesses, and opportunities to present business models and growth strategies to panels of industry professionals and investors. What career options are available if I don’t start my own business immediately? MBA graduates can pursue roles in Venture Capital (VC) and Private Equity (PE) firms, join startups in leadership roles such as Entrepreneur-in-Residence, or work as consultants in family business strategy, governance, and entrepreneurship advisory. What technical and analytical skills will I gain after an MBA? MBA (Entrepreneurship & Family Business) students develop skills in digital transformation, startup financial modelling, data-driven decision-making, and design thinking frameworks for product and business development. Are there opportunities for global exposure in the MBA (Entrepreneurship & Family Business) program? Yes, the MBA program offers exposure to global innovation and entrepreneurship ecosystems, along with opportunities for international immersion and exchange programs through partnerships with global universities. B.A (Hons.) Psychology - Bennett University International Admissions Research Alumni Career Online Payment Library Student-Faculty Login B.A (Hons.) Psychology The Psychology major at the School of Liberal Arts, Bennett University offers an exceptional and transformative educational journey, blending interdisciplinary knowledge, global exposure, and a holistic understanding of psychology. Psychology is the science and art of the mind and behaviour. It explores how humans think, feel, and act, encompassing areas such as cognitive processes, emotions, motivation, mental health, and social interactions. Psychology integrates theoretical perspectives with empirical research to understand human development, personality, and psychopathology. The psychology program is designed to: (i) introduce foundational concepts in psychology, including cognitive, developmental, and social psychology in the first two semesters; (ii) develop research and analytical skills through coursework in research methods, neuropsychology, and psychological testing; and (iii) offer advanced electives in clinical, counselling, and organizational psychology in the later semesters. (iv) exposure to applied aspects of psychology Experimental work: Lab-based courses involve experimental design, data collection, and psychological assessments. Theory courses – 3-4 lectures a week depending on course credits, each lasting 55 minutes. Laboratory courses – Practical assessments and data-driven research projects. The curriculum is designed to offer a strong academic foundation through Major-Core courses , complemented by Major-Electives for added specialization. Major-Core At the heart of the program, the Major-Core (MJ) curriculum delivers essential and advanced coursework, with students required to complete a minimum of 45 credits, up to a maximum of 60 credits. Personality Theory and Application Bibliophile-Psychology Statistics for Psychology Cyberpsychology Foundation of Positive Psychology Forensic Psychology Organizational Psychology I Counselling Psychology for Change Organizational Psychology II Psychology of Ageing Gender Psychology Diaspora and Migration Psychology Mandatory Internship Major-Elective To further enrich their learning experience, students can select from Major-Electives (MJ-Elec), offering additional flexibility and breadth, with credit options ranging from a minimum of 27 to a maximum of 36 credits. Psychology of Parenting Cross-Cultural Psychology Adv Social Psychology Biopsychology Geriatric Psychology Emotions and Implications Trauma and Resilience in Marginalized Populations Health Psychology Psychometric Testing and Experimental Psychology Admission Counsellors Connect with our counsellors for any admissions related queries. explore Fee Structure Know more about fee structure. explore Scholarship Know more about Scholarship. explore Fee Structure 2025 Major: Psychology | Political Science & IR | Economics | English | Business Studies | Philosophy | Sociology Fee Type Year 1 Year 2 Year 3 TOTAL Tuition fee (₹) 4,70,000 4,70,000 4,70,000 14,10,000 Registration Fees One Time (₹) 45,000 – – 45,000 Total Fees (₹) 5,15,000 4,70,000 4,70,000 14,55,000 * Fee is subject to revision with the new academic year as per Bennett University policy. Student Testimonials This course has taught me many things, like the society we live in, whereas subjects like Sociology and Psychology have helped me grasp various concepts Priyansha BA Liberal Arts Batch: 2020-23 The faculty and coordinators of Bennett University have given it all to make the virtual transition a more effortless process. Ranveer BA Liberal Arts Batch: 2020-23 Everything went smoothly online, from classrooms, libraries, resources, events, and even exams. My professors supported and guided me. Sri Guna BA Liberal Arts Batch: 2020-23 The Liberal Arts program is designed in a way that it provides not only holistic education but also overall personality development. Tanvi BA Liberal Arts Batch: 2020-23 Events BA Honours Programmes Frequently Asked Questions When was the B.A Liberal Arts program initiated under the School of Liberal Arts at Bennett University? The Liberal Arts program started with its first batch in 2020. It offers the opportunity to learn from highly qualified and experienced teachers. The program's foundation rests on two pillars -- the development of all-around personality and life skills. What are the majors available in the BA Liberal Arts course at Bennett University? The students can choose Majors from seven domains: Psychology, Political Science & IR, Economics, English, Business Studies, Philosophy & Sociology How is the BA Liberal Arts curriculum structured? In the first semester of the program, the students will be introduced to all the majors to select the Major which suits them the most. The choice of Majors and Electives is given from the second semester onwards. How do electives benefit a student's career? An elective is a combination of courses taken through the duration of university education. The courses taken as electives allow students to understand the world with exposure to a wide range of subjects and areas of practice. This broader understanding is a critical requirement to succeed in the world of the future. Can an undergraduate student take part in research activities? Bennett University focuses on research, experiential, and applied learning. Undergraduate students are encouraged to work with members of the faculty in their live research projects. Such exposure makes students understand the intricacies of the research process and deepens their knowledge Do you assist students in placements, summer internships, and industry tours? Bennett University has a dedicated Career Services Centre that works closely with the industry to participate in guest lectures, curricular inputs, joint program development, internships, and placements. What are the future career options after pursuing BA Liberal Arts? BA Liberal Arts graduates can look for rewarding careers in advertising, public relations, financial analysis, design, journalism, publishing, corporate communications, marketing, etc., or start a successful entrepreneurial journey of their own. What kind of industry exposure do students have access to? This is one of the unique hallmarks of the BA Liberal Arts program as it benefits from faculty members teaching courses in management, which in turn, provides students an opportunity to continuously interact with industry experts from India and abroad. Design Global – Fashion Design Study at Kent State University, USA Apply Now Global Pathways Program B. Design Global - Fashion Design (2+2) Bennett University’s Global Pathways Program is designed to provide students with an exceptional international learning experience. Under this initiative, students enrolled in the Bachelor of Design (Global) - Fashion Design program will have an opportunity to complete the initial years of their degree at Bennett University, followed by the remaining coursework at Kent State University, USA, subject to meeting the eligibility criteria of the partner university. This structured pathway allows students to gain international exposure, study in a globally recognized academic environment, and earn a prestigious international degree from Kent State University, USA. The curriculum at Bennett University is carefully aligned with that of Kent State University to ensure a seamless academic transition, avoiding redundancy while maximizing learning outcomes. Upon successful completion of the program and fulfilling all academic requirements, students will be awarded an international degree - Bachelor of Arts degree in Fashion Design from Kent State University, USA. Program Details Name Duration University Curriculum Highlights Final Program Degree Bachelor of Design (B. Des) Global - Fashion Design 4 Years Years 1 & 2 at Bennett University , India Hands‑on foundation in fashion: illustration, draping, pattern‑making & garment construction Emphasis on digital tools (Clo 3D, Adobe), sustainable design thinking. Industry‑linked internships and live projects. Access to labs: pattern‑making, garment construction, VR, media, and design workshops Bachelor of Arts - Fashion Design Years 3 & 4 at Kent State University, USA Core stages: conceptual, technical and production design: trend research, technical sketch & illustrated renderings, pattern‑making & construction, fit & fabric selection, tech‑packs. Courses include Sustainable Fashion Thinking, Fashion Technology, History of Fashion, Fashion Portfolio I & II, Internship, Study Away (NYC, Florence, Paris), and elective studios (e.g., machine knitting, advanced draping) 2D/3D fashion practice, machine knitting, computer-integrated textile design. BENNETT.EDU.IN Key Recruiters Faculty Prof. (Dr.) Manisha Mohan Animation, UI UX and Game Design Dr. Mukesh Singh Painting, Sculpture and Foundation Studies Ms. Anu Jain Fashion Design Mr. Wajahat Rather Fashion and Textile Design Ms. Snigdha Banerjee Animation and Game Design Dr. Om Singh Communication Design ELIGIBILITY B. Design Global Fashion Design (2+2) Eligibility Criteria & Selection Process Eligibility Criteria Passed XII standard from any recognised Education Board with minimum 50% Marks OR IB Board with minimum score of 24 credits, 3 Higher level and 3 standard level subjects. Completion of minimum 24 credit hours of college-level coursework at Bennett University with an overall CGPA of 2.750 or above. Students with fewer than 24 credits may be evaluated under Kent State’s freshman admission policies. Students not meeting the 2.750 GPA requirement may be considered for the Pre-Fashion Design and Merchandising track at Kent State and can declare the Fashion Design major upon completing 12 credit hours of non-developmental coursework at Kent with a minimum 2.750 GPA. English proficiency requirements for international transfer to Kent State University: TOEFL iBT: Minimum 71 IELTS: Minimum 6.0 PTE: Minimum 47 DET: Minimum 100 OR completion of ELS Level 112 Intensive English Program Selection Process Design Entrance Test –UCEED (UG Common Entrance Examination for Design) Portfolio Presentation and Evaluation Personal Interview will be conducted with the panel during the admission process. OUR ASK B. Design Global Fashion Design (2+2) Frequently Asked Questions What is the Global Pathway Programme at Bennett University? The Global Pathway Programme (GPP) is an academic collaboration that allows students to complete the first two years of their Bachelor of Design - Fashion Design at Bennett University and transfer to Kent State University, USA, for the remaining two years. Upon successful completion, students earn a globally recognized degree - Bachelor of Arts in Fashion Design from Kent State University, USA. What are the benefits of enrolling in the B. Design Global – Fashion Design program at Bennett University? Global Recognition: Graduate with a prestigious U.S. degree from Kent State University. Cost Efficiency: Save significantly by completing half the program in India. Industry Exposure: Opportunities to intern with leading global fashion brands. Cultural Diversity: Gain international exposure to enhance personal and professional growth. What is the admission eligibility for the B. Design Global – Fashion Design program? Students must have passed XII standard from any recognised Education Board with minimum 50% Marks OR IB Board with minimum score of 24 credits, 3 Higher level and 3 standard level subjects. Completion of minimum 24 credit hours of college-level coursework at Bennett University with an overall CGPA of 2.750 or above. Students with fewer than 24 credits may be evaluated under Kent State’s freshman admission policies. Students not meeting the 2.750 GPA requirement may be considered for the Pre-Fashion Design and Merchandising track at Kent State and can declare the Fashion Design major upon completing 12 credit hours of non-developmental coursework at Kent with a minimum 2.750 GPA. English proficiency requirements for international transfer to Kent State University: TOEFL iBT: Minimum 71 IELTS: Minimum 6.0 PTE: Minimum 47 DET: Minimum 100 OR completion of ELS Level 112 Intensive English Program How does the 2+2 model in B. Design Global – Fashion Design work? Years 1 & 2: Study at Bennett University, India Fashion Fundamentals, Apparel Construction, Fashion Visuals Sustainable Fashion, Drawing, Textiles, Introduction to Technology Art History, Statistics, Microeconomics, Design Thinking Years 3 & 4: Transfer to Kent State University, USA – Fashion Technology Applications, Fashion Design Studios I & II Portfolio Development, Internship (ELR), Marketing, Fashion History Additional electives and general education requirements Capstone projects and portfolio presentation What degree will I receive after completing the program? You will be awarded a globally recognized degree - Bachelor of Arts in Fashion Design from Kent State University, USA How much cost savings can I expect? By following the 2+2 model, students save approximately ₹50 lakhs, compared to completing all four years at Kent State University, USA. What career opportunities are available after this program? After graduation, students enrolled in B. Design (Global) can seek and explore career opportunities as Fashion Designer, CAD Designer, Technical Designer, Product Developer, Creative Director, Textile and Knitwear Designer or Fashion Illustrator and Trend Forecaster to name a few. Eligibility for a U.S.A post-study work visa for up to 2 years. Research & internship opportunities at Kent State University, U.S.A. How do I apply for the program? Interested students can apply through Bennett University’s admissions portal, submit academic records, and meet the eligibility criteria for credit transfer to Kent State University, USA. School of Design - Bennett University International Admissions Research Alumni Career Online Payment Library Student-Faculty Login School of Design ABOUT About School of Design A Design School that stays current and relevant with the TIMES, with a future ready, personalized curriculum, research driven, interdisciplinary approach to human centered design, a focus on innovation & entrepreneurship, and a platform or hands on learning with the industry’s best. Bennett University’s School of Design opens its doors for creative minds and innovators, inviting students to embark on an immersive journey in design. With a mission to redefine conventional problem-solving, the school promotes dynamic discourse, challenges established paradigms, and fosters a culture where creativity meets purpose. Through this vision, the school aims to equip future designers with the skills and perspective needed to address contemporary challenges through innovative, sustainable, and impactful solutions. The global design industry today is marked by rapid technological advancements and an increasing emphasis on sustainable, user-centered, and data-driven design. Global demand is increasing for eco-conscious design solutions that prioritize sustainable materials and processes, reflecting society’s call for environmental responsibility. Design professionals with an understanding of Artificial Intelligence (AI), virtual and augmented reality, and data visualization build immersive and interactive experiences and are highly sought after. As a result, there is a growing emphasis on interdisciplinary skills that blend creativity with technological fluency. The mission is to empower students with the ability to envision future solutions and bring them to life, equipping them for a global industry that values bold ideas and transformative design. View Profile × Prof. (Dr.) Manisha Mohan Dean, School of Design It gives me great pleasure to welcome you to Bennett School of Design — a place where innovation meets purpose, and aesthetics and problem solving go hand in hand driven by a vision of meaningful impact. In today’s rapidly evolving world, the role of a designer is more crucial than ever, transcending traditional boundaries to create solutions that enhance lives and empower communities. We believe in not only equipping our students with the skills needed to succeed in the industry, but also with the ethics and values that will shape them into leaders for a better tomorrow. True to the Times Group philosophy. our Design School stays current and relevant with the times, with a future ready, personalized curriculum, research driven, interdisciplinary approach to human centered design, a focus on innovation & entrepreneurship, and an ecosystem rich with inputs from the industry. Our programs are built upon three central pillars: the power of user centred design, interwoven with Emerging Technologies and alignment of the learning experience with international design trends. By intertwining time-tested principles with cutting-edge advancements, we foster a unique learning environment that provides a deep understanding of core design principles, pushing the frontiers of global design. We believe that great design is born at the intersection of knowledge and empathy, where insights from people’s needs and aspirations illuminate the path forward. At Bennett School of Design, we nurture an entrepreneurial mindset, encouraging our students to think independently, innovate fearlessly, and approach challenges with a spirit of curiosity and resilience. Whether through hands-on projects, collaborations with industry leaders, or engagement with real-world social challenges, our students gain the experience and confidence to drive sustainable change. As you explore our school and its offerings, I hope you’ll feel inspired by the opportunities that await here — opportunities to not only advance your skills but to make a genuine difference. Together, let’s envision a world that is more inclusive, sustainable, and beautifully designed. Program B. Des (Hons.) B. Tech CSE Global – 3 Country Program - Bennett University International Admissions Research Alumni Career Online Payment Library Student-Faculty Login B. Tech CSE Global – 3 Country Program Study in India, UAE, and UK About B. Tech CSE Global – 3 Country Program (2+1+1) B. Tech CSE Global – 3 Country Program (2+1+1) At Bennett University, we believe a truly global education goes beyond the classroom. That’s why we’ve partnered with the University of Birmingham, UK—a prestigious member of the UK’s Russell Group—to launch the B. Tech CSE Global – 3 Country Program. This four-year program takes students on a transformative academic journey across India, Dubai, and the UK, blending rigorous engineering education with multicultural exposure and experience. In the first two years, students study at Bennett University, India, followed by a third year at the University of Birmingham, Dubai campus, and complete the final year at the University of Birmingham, UK. The program empowers students not only to be eligible for placements in India, the UAE, and the UK, while also opening doors to two years of post-study work opportunities in the UK. The program is designed to offer world-class learning and practical experiences, while also being cost-effective, allowing students to complete the initial years in India and the UAE before transitioning to the UK. Graduates walk away not only with a globally recognized degree in Computer Science and Software Engineering but also with a rich international perspective and a competitive edge in the global job market. Program Details Name Duration University Degree B. Tech CSE Global – 3 Country Program (2+1+1) 4 Years Years 1 & 2 at Bennett University, India Year 3 at University of Birmingham, Dubai Campus, UAE Year 4 at University of Birmingham, UK B. Partner University University of Birmingham Founded in 1900, the University of Birmingham is one of the world’s leading public research universities. It holds membership in the Russell Group and is ranked among the top 100 universities globally (QS World Rankings). With cutting-edge programs in engineering, computing, and sciences, the university combines academic rigor with real-world relevance. Its Dubai campus extends this excellence to the Middle East, offering identical curriculum, faculty standards, and global recognition. QS World Rankings 2026 - 76 Key Benefits Global Degree : Begin in India and graduate with a UK degree. Multiple Career Pathways : Eligible for placements in India, UAE, UK, or higher education globally. Global Employability : Leverage alumni networks and career services in Dubai and Birmingham, UK. Visa Advantage : UK’s Graduate Route allows two years of post-study work opportunities. Career Opportunities & Future Prospects After graduation, students enrolled in the B.Tech CSE Global – 3 Country Program can seek and explore career opportunities as Technology Analyst, Product Engineer, Sustainability Consultant, AI/ML Developer, Automation Specialist, Systems Engineer, Software Engineer, Systems Designer, Robotics Specialist, IoT Developer, AI/ML Engineer, and Research Associate to name a few in MNCs, R&D labs, startups, and public policy tech units. Who Should Apply? Students aspiring for an international engineering career with exposure to global innovation ecosystems. Candidates aiming to experience academic mobility across three countries without interruption in curriculum. Learners looking to develop technical, cultural, and leadership competencies in a competitive global setting. Curriculum Details The curriculum of B. Tech Global – 3 Country Program in partnership with the University of Birmingham, UK is crafted to equip students with cutting-edge technical skills and a deep understanding of global technological trends. NIT, Warangal Ms. Shraddha Jain Ph.D. (Pursuing) - IIT BHU, Varanasi BENNETT.EDU.IN Key Recruiters ELIGIBILITY Eligibility Criteria & Selection Process Eligibility Criteria Domestic Passed XII standard from any recognised Education Board with Physics and Mathematics and any other third subject with minimum 65% marks OR IB Board with minimum score of 24 credits, 3 Higher level and 3 standard level subjects. NRI Passed with 60% aggregate marks in grade 12th/ A level or equivalent (with Physics & Mathematics) and English language requirement (ELR). Selection Criteria Selection will be based on merit of Class XII Best of 3 subjects score (comprising of Physics and Maths as compulsory subjects and any other third subject with highest score) Personal Interview will be conducted with the panel during the admission process. Note: Third subject should not be vocational- Music, Dance, Painting, Home Science, Arts, etc. Note: English proficiency tests like IELTS/TOEFL may be required. OUR ASK Frequently Asked Questions What is the structure of the B. Tech CSE Global – 3 Country Program? Students study Year 1 & 2 at Bennett University, India; Year 3 at University of Birmingham, Dubai Campus, and Year 4 at University of Birmingham, UK. What degree will I receive? On successful completion, students will be awarded a B. Eng Computer Science and Software Engineering global degree from the University of Birmingham, UK. Is B. Tech CSE Global – 3 Country Program open to all streams? The program is primarily for students interested in Engineering, Technology, Artificial Intelligence and or related fields. Are there internship opportunities available to the students of the B. Tech CSE Global – 3 Country Program? Yes, there are internship and industry immersion opportunities in the UK, Dubai and India. Are scholarships available? Yes, merit-based scholarships may be offered by Bennett University and other partners. What career paths can I pursue after completing this program? After graduation, students enrolled in 3 Country B.Tech CSE Global – 3 Country Program can seek and explore career opportunities as: Technology Analyst, Product Engineer, Sustainability Consultant, AI/ML Developer, Automation Specialist, Systems Engineer, Software Engineer, Systems Designer, Robotics Specialist, IoT Developer, AI/ML Engineer, Research Associate to name a few in Global MNCs, R&D labs, startups, and public policy tech units. Can I stay in the UK after graduation? Yes, under the UK’s Post Study Work Visa (Graduate Route), students can stay and work for up to two years after graduation. Master of Technology (M.Tech) Materials Science and Engineering course, Eligibility, Fee, Curriculum|Bennett University International Admissions Research Alumni Career Online Payment Library Student-Faculty Login Master of Technology ( M.Tech ) ( Materials Science & Engineering ) Apply Now Master of Technology ( M.Tech ) ( Materials Science & Engineering ) Apply Now About M.Tech (Materials Science and Engineering) The Master of Technology (M.Tech) in Materials Science and Engineering (MSE) is a two-year interdisciplinary program designed to equip students with a deep understanding of the structure, properties, synthesis, processing, and applications of advanced materials. The curriculum combines rigorous theory with practical experience in nanotechnology, computational materials science, energy materials, and functional materials. Students gain hands-on training in state-of-the-art laboratories, including Nanotechnology, Optics, and Computational Physics Labs. Graduates are prepared for high-impact careers in research and development, academia, and industries such as semiconductors, renewable energy, aerospace, defence, and biomedical engineering. The program emphasises innovation, sustainability, and global technological relevance, aligning with national initiatives like Atmanirbhar Bharat and the National Quantum Mission. Duration 2 Years Specialisations 4 Credits 80 Start Date July 2026 Curriculum Highlights Experiential & Practical Learning: Extensive lab components, hands-on fabrication, and advanced characterisation training. Global Exposure: Curriculum aligned with leading international programs and current global research trends. Unique Curriculum Features (USPs): Integration of computational and experimental modules, dissertation-based research, and industry/academic collaborations. Why M.Tech (Materials Science and Engineering) from Bennett University? Interdisciplinary curriculum integrating applied sciences, and engineering. Hands-on experience in advanced research labs with modern synthesis and characterisation facilities. Exposure to computational tools such as DFT and molecular dynamics. Strong industry and research linkages with organisations like DRDO, ISRO, and DST. Focus on cutting-edge areas such as quantum materials, energy devices, and smart materials. Learning Outcomes Upon successful completion of the program, graduates will be able to: Demonstrate a comprehensive understanding of the structure-property-processing-performance relationships in a wide range of materials. Apply advanced experimental and computational techniques to design, synthesise, and characterise materials for targeted applications. Analyse and interpret research data critically, integrating theoretical knowledge with practical insights to solve complex materials challenges. Communicate scientific ideas and research outcomes effectively through technical writing and oral presentations. Exhibit professional ethics, teamwork, and leadership skills while addressing sustainability and societal impact in materials innovation. Career Pathways Graduates of the M.Tech in Materials Science and Engineering (MSE) program can pursue careers in R&D with organizations such as DRDO, ISRO, BARC, CSIR, Intel, Samsung, and Tesla; take up academic and research roles in universities; or work across the semiconductor, energy, aerospace, automotive, and biomaterials sectors. They can also launch startups in nanotechnology, renewable energy, and advanced materials innovation. Eligibility Criteria Indian Nationals: Candidate must have a Bachelor’s degree in B.E / B.Tech. (EP /ECE / EE / EIE / ME/MSE ) or M.Sc. (Electronics /Physics/ Chemistry/ Nanotechnology/ Material Science or related disciplines) or equivalent degree in the above Disciplines with a minimum 50% or equivalent CGPA. NRIs: An international applicant must have a bachelor’s degree in Engineering/ Technology/ Architecture or equivalent of MCA/ MIT/ MSc with minimum 50% marks with English as medium of instruction. Selection Process Selection will be based on Aggregate Graduation Percentage. M.Tech (Materials Science and Engineering) Program Fee Get detailed information about the M.Tech (Materials Science and Engineering) program fee structure, including tuition, hostel fee, and other applicable charges. Click here for details. Program Objectives The M.Tech in Materials Science and Engineering program aims to develop highly skilled professionals capable of innovating across the complete materials value chain from design and synthesis to characterisation and applications. It seeks to build a deep understanding of structure-property-processing relationships while fostering proficiency in experimental, computational, and analytical techniques. The program emphasises interdisciplinary problem-solving, sustainability, and technological innovation in key sectors such as energy, electronics, aerospace, and healthcare. Graduates will be equipped with the knowledge, research skills, and ethical perspective required for leadership roles in academia, industry, and advanced research aligned with national and global scientific priorities. Singh Ph.D. - IIT, Delhi Dr. Priyanka Mathur Ph.D. - Shiv Nadar Institute of Eminence, Greater Noida Dr. Arindam Lala Ph.D. - Calcutta University Dr. Umesh Sharma Post-Doctoral - IIT, Delhi Dr. Anil Rajput Post-Doctoral Fellow - IIT, Dhanbad Dr. Ashima Sharma Ph.D - NIT, Delhi Dr. Ashish Maurya Ph.D.- IIT, Dhanbad Dr. Shitanshu Arya Ph.D. - IIT Delhi, New Delhi OUR ASK M.Tech (Materials Science and Engineering) Program Frequently Asked Questions What is the eligibility criterion for M.Tech (MSE) program? B.E./B.Tech. in Engineering Physics, Metallurgy, Materials Science, Mechanical, Electrical, Electronics and Communication Engineering, Chemical Engineering, Biotechnology or equivalent discipline or M.Sc. in Physics, Chemistry, Materials Science, Nanoscience, Electronics or related fields. Marks Criteria: Minimum 60% marks or equivalent CGPA What are the key research areas covered in M.Tech MSE? Nanomaterials, energy materials, functional materials, quantum materials, and computational modeling. Are there hands-on lab components for M.Tech Materials Science program? Yes, students will undergo extensive lab training in Nanotechnology, Optics, and Computational Materials Science. Is there a research dissertation in M.Tech MSE at Bennett University? Yes, a year-long dissertation project is part of the final year to develop research and problem-solving skills. What are the career prospects in M.Tech Materials Science? Graduates can pursue careers in R&D, academia, high-tech industries, or startups. Are there collaborations with industry or research institutions? Faculty members have active collaborations with many national and international research institutes/universities. Does M.Tech MSE program include computational training? Yes, courses like Modeling and Simulation of Materials and Computational Physics Lab provide strong computational exposure. Can students pursue Ph.D. after M.Tech Materials Science program? Absolutely, the program provides a strong foundation for doctoral studies in India or abroad. What is the USP of Bennett University’s M.Tech Materials Science and Engineering program? Its interdisciplinary design, integration of theory with hands-on learning, and focus on emerging research areas such as quantum and energy materials. Global Pathways - Bennett University International Admissions Research Alumni Career Online Payment Library Student-Faculty Login Global Pathways Program – B. Tech Computer Science & Engineering Global Study at Iowa State University, USA Apply Now Global Pathways Program – B. Tech Computer Science & Engineering Global Study at Iowa State University, USA Apply Now B.Tech Computer Science & Engineering - Global (2+2) with Iowa State University, USA Empower your future with the B. Tech Computer Science Engineering - Global (2+2) Pathway Program at Bennett University. Designed for ambitious students ready to make an impact in the world of technology, the B. Tech Global Pathways program allows students to build a strong technical foundation with two years at Bennett University, India, before transferring to the renowned Iowa State University, USA, for the final two years. Upon successful completion, students earn a globally recognized Bachelor of Science in Computer Science Engineering degree from Iowa State University. The B. Tech CSE – Global (2+2) is a perfect program for students seeking a world-class education, enhanced career opportunities, and a global academic experience without committing to an entire program abroad from the outset. Program Details Name Duration University Curriculum Highlights B. Tech Computer Science & Engineering - Global (2+2) 4 Years Years 1 & 2 at Bennett University , India Core CSE fundamentals, programming, mathematics, algorithms, and basic engineering subjects. Years 3 & 4 at Iowa State University, USA Advanced CSE subjects, research, electives, and specialization in areas like AI, Data Science, Cybersecurity, etc. Final Program Degree Bachelor of Science – Computer Engineering Program Objectives To provide students with an exposure to international education with real-world exposure. To develop critical thinking, leadership and entrepreneurship skills with global standards. To enhance career prospects in creative writing. Global Academic Experience Students gain international exposure by studying at globally recognized universities. Seamless Credit Transfer Academic programs are carefully mapped to ensure a smooth transition between institutions. Cost-Effective Pathway Students save on overall tuition and living costs compared to a full-length international program. Internationally Recognized Degree Graduates earn a degree from a reputed partner university, enhancing their global career prospects. Cultural and Professional Growth Exposure to diverse academic, cultural, and professional environments enriches personal and career development. ABOUT Why Choose B. Tech CSE - Global (2+2) Program Access to a global research ecosystem for advanced learning and innovation. Opportunities to participate in impactful research projects led by renowned faculty. A pathway to a prestigious US degree that enhances employability in the global job market. A vibrant, student-centric environment with excellent support for international students. By completing initial years in India, students can save up to 70 lakhs for 2 years (In case you spend 4 years at Iowa State University). Eligible for up to 3 years of post-study work permit or Optional Practical Training (OPT). Partner University Iowa State University Iowa State University (ISU) is a world -renowned public research university located in Ames, Iowa, USA. Established in 1858, ISU is recognized for its innovation, academic excellence and leadership in engineering and technology driven research programs. ISU ranks among the top universities in the United States for Computer Science and Engineering, and it is also a part of the prestigious Association of American Universities (AAU), which represents the top research-intensive institutions in North America. QS World Rankings 2026 - 449 Key Features Global Curriculum: Aligned to meet the academic rigor and international standards of Iowa State University. Dual Exposure: Indian academic foundations combined with U.S. education methodologies. Global Degree: Receive a Bachelor of Science - Computer Engineering from Iowa State University after successful completion. Seamless Credit Transfer: Structured articulation to ensure smooth transition after Year 2. Cost-Effective: Two years in India followed by two years in the U.S. to optimize costs. Cultural Immersion: Opportunity to experience both Indian and American academic and cultural environments. About B.Tech Computer Science Engineering (Global) The curriculum is forward-looking and designed for industry requirements. It focuses on futuristic technologies such as Artificial Intelligence (AI), Robotics, Machine Learning, IoT, Genetic Research, Bioinformatics, Big Data DevOps, Blockchain, Augmented & Virtual reality, Drones, Quantum Computing, Product Design Technology, Cyber Security, Full Stack, Cloud Computing, Automation, Gaming and more. At the School of Computer Science Engineering and Technology, the B.Tech Global course curriculum/syllabus & teaching pedagogy give equal importance to theory and hands-on training. The syllabus has been designed based on the latest market trends, industry needs and research outcomes relevant to different domains of CSE. About Partner University Iowa State University (ISU) is a world -renowned prestigious public research university located in Ames, Iowa, USA. Established in 1858, ISU is recognized for its innovation, academic excellence and leadership in engineering and technology driven research programs. ISU ranks among the top universities in the United States for Computer Science and Engineering, and it is also a part of the prestigious Association of American Universities (AAU), which represents the top research-intensive institutions in North America. Ranking & Reputation: Ranked among the top-tier U.S. institutions for CSE. State-of-the-Art Infrastructure: Cutting-edge research labs, innovation centres, and collaborative learning spaces. Industry Connections: Strong partnerships with global tech leaders like Google, Microsoft, and Amazon. QS Ranking 2025: Iowa State University ranks 470 as per current QS ranking 2025. Why Choose Iowa State University for the B. Tech CSE Global 2+2 Program? Access to a global research ecosystem for advanced learning and innovation. Opportunities to participate in impactful research projects led by renowned faculty. A pathway to a prestigious U.S. degree that enhances employability in the global job market. A vibrant, student-centric environment with excellent support for international students. Curriculum Details Curriculum B.Tech CSE Global @ Bennett University Read More... Curriculum BS Computer Engineering @ Iowa State University Read More... For more details about the Partnership between Iowa State University and Bennett University Click here >> Specialisations Artificial Intelligence The CEOs and CXOs of NVIDIA, Aindra, Here Tech, Amazon, and other academicians have contributed to the curriculum design of the specialisation. The specialisation electives offered under AI are Cognitive Modelling, Advanced Computer Vision and Video Analytics, Reinforcement Learning, Image and Video Processing, and Natural Language Processing. These courses match the best of international standards in AI specialisation. The other high point is the arrangement the University has reached with NVIDIA, SAP, Hitachi and Times Internet to enable students to work on cutting-edge projects. Know More Cloud Computing Cloud Computing is in high market demand for its scalability, on-demand solutions, and flexible pricing. To match the demand, there are specialised electives and certification options available, that include Cloud Services Development and Operations, Git and GitHub for Version Control, AWS Cloud Support Associate, Developing Solutions for Microsoft Azure, Google Associate Cloud Engineer, among others. Know More Blockchain The curriculum for Blockchain specialisation has been developed in consultation with CEOs and CXOs of BankchainAsset.com, Digiledge, besides other subject matter experts. The specialisation electives offered as part of the B.Tech syllabus include Blockchain Technologies, Smart Contracts and Solidity Programming, Digital Currencies and Blockchain, Modern Cryptography, among others. * Samyak Jain (B.Tech CSE 2017-21) launched ‘Instadapp,’ a start-up for managing blockchain-based assets, and received funding of 1.4 million USD in 2019. Know More Cyber Security With increased dependency on online transactions and other social activities, there is now high demand for a robust Cyber Security framework. Keeping that in mind, the Cyber Security curriculum has been designed by the CEOs and CXOs of the Data Security Council of India (DSCI), QoS Technologies, IBM, and other researchers. The courseware includes topics on Cyber Security with Blockchain, Malware Analysis for Mobile Devices, Security and Privacy for Big Data Analytics, Penetration Testing and Ethical Hacking, among others. Also, to have students work on cutting-edge projects, the University has tied-up with DSCI, Fortinet, CompTIA and CISCO. Know More Data Science Data scientists play a key role in the working of smart cities, automation industry, BFSI and Fintech. Given the importance of Data Science, Bennett University has put together a curriculum with the help of CEOs and CXOs of Microsoft, Google, TCS, and other researchers. The curriculum includes elective courses on Structural Equation Modelling; Security and Privacy for Big Data Analytics; Data Visualisation; Big Data Analytics and Business Intelligence; and Satellite Data Analytics. Know More Gaming As of 2022, the gaming industry is worth 200 billion dollars which encompasses dozens of job disciplines and thousands of exciting jobs worldwide. Due to the gaming industry’s significance to culture, entertainment and technological growth, it is one of the most interesting sectors in the contemporary technological landscape. Know More Robotic Process Automation The specialisation helps students learn about software-based tools that help to automate manual rule-based human tasks. CEOs and CXOs of Automation Anywhere, UIPath have contributed in designing its curriculum. Courses on Advanced Robotic Process Automation; Digital Process Automation Architecture; and Enterprise Process Automation Framework are offered to students as part of the specialisation electives. (Bot Lab by Automation Anywhere and Speech Devices Lab by Amazon are available to students.) Know More DevOps DevOps practices help merge development, quality assurance, and operations (deployment and integration) into a single, continuous set of processes. The key topics covered in this specialisation comprise Introduction to Advanced DevOps concepts, Cloud Services, Integration, Deployment and Testing, among others. Students get the opportunity to study advanced subjects such as Cloud Services Development and Operations, Software Craftsmanship in DevOps, Test Automation in DevOps, Agile Software Development, and many others from the choice of subjects available as specialisation electives. Know More Full Stack The specialisation helps students understand the industry trends on accelerating the processes of design, development, and deployment. The specialisation electives available for Full Stack are Front-End Web UI Frameworks and Tools: Bootstrap, Front-End Web UI Frameworks, and Tools: React, Mobile App Development with React Native, and Application Development with Cloud Platforms, among many others. Know More Drones The drone specialisation builds critical thinking and problem solving skills in addition to technical skills, which benefit students along any career path they choose. Students who pick up the specialisation can contribute to safe infrastructure maintenance; to law enforcement support; and to agriculture management. Know More Quantum Computing Today, industries, academia, private and government organisations around the world are spending billions of dollars on quantum research and development. In fact, leading companies such as Google, Microsoft, IBM, Air-Bus, and Intel are in race to achieve quantum supremacy. In line with it, Bennett University has designed a curriculum for Quantum Computing, covering topics such as Quantum Computing Foundations; Machine Learning with Quantum Computing; Quantum Computing for Data Analysis; Quantum Cryptography; Quantum Information Theory; Quantum Computer Architecture; Security and Privacy for Big Data Analytics; and Cloud Infrastructure and Services. Know More IoT and Robotics IoRT is not IoT aided by Robotics or Robotics driven by IoT- but rather an amalgamation of the disciplines. It was slowly formed as a result of realizations that the two fields had a lot of overlapping of purpose, and could greatly benefit from a focus on their combination. Because the subject of robotics contains both hardware and software components, understanding of both is particularly valuable. Robotics is a holistic combined process of designing an autonomously working structure which logically comprehends the stimulus around and responding to it. Know More Augmented & Virtual Reality The market wants professionals who can use Augmented Reality (AR), Virtual Reality (VR) and Extended Reality (ER) to superposition the virtual environment on the physical world. To prepare the students for it, Bennett University has got CEOs and CXOs of well-known organisations such as Simulanis, Yeppar, Whitebears Studio, Probability Gaming, Scientific Games to design a suitable curriculum. Courses on VR Gaming, VR and 360, Video Production, 3D Interaction Design in Virtual Reality and Game Mechanics are offered as part of the Specialisation Electives. For project development, resources such as Apple Mac Lab, Nao Robot V6, and other head-mounted devices are available within the campus. Students completing the course will become market ready for jobs such as, AR-VR game developer, UX/UI Designer, Mixed reality artist and technical 3D artist. Know More Product Design Technology The specialisation brings together the creativity and practicality needed to bridge the gap between design engineering and product design. Product design technology empowers the students to create and visualise innovative concepts and transform the concepts into working products. The specialisation focuses on imparting technical skills such as using computational analysis to design the structure of products. Know More Mobile Technologies Mobile Technologies specialization encompasses iOS technology. Swift is a powerful and intuitive programming language for iOS, iPadOS, macOS, tvOS, and watchOS. Writing Swift code is interactive and fun, the syntax is concise yet expressive, and Swift includes modern features developers love. Swift code is safe by design and produces software that runs lightning-fast. Read More UI/UX Benefits to Students Globally Recognized ABET(USA) Accreditated Degree enhancing employability worldwide. Cost-Effective Pathway with substantial savings on tuition and living expenses for the first two years. Research and Internship Opportunities at Iowa State University with tech industry giants. Cultural & Academic Diversity through multi-national peer learning and faculty expertise. Post Study Work Permit Opportunity to work in U.S. for up to 3 years. NIT, Warangal Ms. Shraddha Jain Ph.D. (Pursuing) - IIT BHU, Varanasi ELIGIBILITY B.Tech Computer Science Engineering (Global) Eligibility Criteria & Selection Process Eligibility-Domestic & SAARC Domestic Passed XII standard from any recognised Education Board with Physics and Mathematics & any other third* subject with minimum 60% marks OR IB Board with minimum score of 24 credits, 3 Higher level and 3 standard level subjects. <!– NRI Pass with 60% aggregate marks in grade 12th/ A level or equivalent (with physics & mathematics) and English language requirement (ELR) –> Selection Process Selection will be based on merit of Class XII Best of 3 subjects score (comprising of Physics and Maths as compulsory subjects and any other third subject with highest score) Personal Interview will be conducted with the panel during the admission process. Note : Third subject should not be vocational- Music, Dance, Painting, Home Science, Arts, etc OUR ASK B.Tech Computer Science Engineering (Global) Frequently Asked Questions What is the Global Pathways Programme at Bennett University? The Global Pathways Programme (GPP) is an academic collaboration that allows students to complete the first two years of their B. Tech in Computer Science Engineering (CSE) at Bennett University and transfer to Iowa State University, USA, for the remaining two years. Upon successful completion, students earn a globally recognized Bachelor of Science in Computer Science & Engineering degree from Iowa State University. What are the benefits of enrolling in this program? Internationally recognized degree from a top US university. Cost-effective compared to completing four years abroad. Seamless Credit Transfer with a structured curriculum. Global exposure and cultural diversity by studying in both India and the USA. Career and research opportunities in a global tech ecosystem. Post-study work permit in the US for up to two years. What is the eligibility criterion for this program? Students must have: Class X & XII aggregate of 60% Minimum 55% aggregate in Physics + Mathematics + a third subject (e.g., Chemistry, CS, IT, Biology, etc.) in Class XII. How does the 2+2 model work? Years 1 & 2: Study at Bennett University, India – Core CSE fundamentals, programming, mathematics, and basic engineering subjects. Years 3 & 4: Transfer to Iowa State University, USA – Advanced CSE subjects, research, and specializations in AI, Data Science, Cybersecurity, etc. What degree will I receive after completing the program? You will be awarded a Bachelor of Science in Computer Science & Engineering from Iowa State University, USA. How much cost savings can I expect? By following the 2+2 model, students save approximately up to ₹70 lakhs, compared to completing all four years at Iowa State University. What career opportunities are available after this program? Opportunities in global tech companies such as Google, Microsoft, Amazon, and Facebook. Eligibility for a U.S. post-study work permit for up to 2 years. Research & internship opportunities at Iowa State University. How do I apply for the B. Tech CSE - Global (2+2) Program? Applying to B. Tech CSE – Global (2+2) program at Bennet University is quick and easy. To apply for the admission, all you need is to share your details (takes less than a minute) and our team will get back you. Click here to apply: https://applications.bennett.edu.in/bu Alternatively, you can reach out to: Madhur Tandon Head, Global Pathways Program Mobile Phone: +91 9654 58 4594 Email: madhur.tandon@bennett.edu.in Download Brochure Enquire Now × SUBMIT YOUR ENQUIRY × Download Brochure WordPress Lightbox
