B.A. (Hons.) Business Studies - Bennett University International Admissions Research Alumni Career Online Payment Library Student-Faculty Login B.A. (Hons.) Business Studies The Business Studies major at Bennett University’s School of Liberal Arts offers a dynamic and interdisciplinary approach to understanding the complex realities of the Indian business world. Combining core business principles with insights from the humanities and social sciences, this program equips students with critical thinking, leadership, and problem-solving skills. With a strong emphasis on problem identification, ethics, innovation, and global perspectives, students gain hands-on experience through case studies, internships, industry interactions, and entrepreneurial initiatives. Graduates are turned future-ready, prepared for diverse career paths in management, entrepreneurship, and consulting, making them adaptable professionals ready to navigate the evolving business landscape with confidence and creativity. The Business Studies program is designed to: (i) introduce foundational business concepts and interdisciplinary approaches in the first two semesters; (ii) explore areas such as management, entrepreneurship, and global markets in the following semesters: and (iii) offer specialized courses in business ethics, digital transformation, and strategic leadership in the later years. Theory courses – 3-4 lectures a week depending on course credits, each lasting 55 minutes. Practical learning – Case studies, internships, industry interactions, and entrepreneurial initiatives. The curriculum is designed to offer a strong academic foundation through Major-Core courses , complemented by Major-Electives for added specialization. Major-Core At the heart of the program, the Major-Core (MJ) curriculum delivers essential and advanced coursework, with students required to complete a minimum of 45 credits, up to a maximum of 60 credits. Accounting Principles Corporate Finance Statistics for Business Operation and Information Management Legal Studies and Business Ethics Intro to Org Behavior Design Thinking and Innovation Intro to Business Research and Methods Introduction to Financial Management Major-Elective To further enrich their learning experience, students can select from Major-Electives (MJ-Elec), offering additional flexibility and breadth, with credit options ranging from a minimum of 27 to a maximum of 36 credits. Tanvi BA Liberal Arts Batch: 2020-23 Events BA Honours Programmes Frequently Asked Questions When was the B.A Liberal Arts program initiated under the School of Liberal Arts at Bennett University? The Liberal Arts program started with its first batch in 2020. It offers the opportunity to learn from highly qualified and experienced teachers. The program's foundation rests on two pillars -- the development of all-around personality and life skills. What are the majors available in the BA Liberal Arts course at Bennett University? The students can choose Majors from seven domains: Psychology, Political Science & IR, Economics, English, Business Studies, Philosophy & Sociology How is the BA Liberal Arts curriculum structured? In the first semester of the program, the students will be introduced to all the majors to select the Major which suits them the most. The choice of Majors and Electives is given from the second semester onwards. How do electives benefit a student's career? An elective is a combination of courses taken through the duration of university education. The courses taken as electives allow students to understand the world with exposure to a wide range of subjects and areas of practice. This broader understanding is a critical requirement to succeed in the world of the future. Can an undergraduate student take part in research activities? Bennett University focuses on research, experiential, and applied learning. Undergraduate students are encouraged to work with members of the faculty in their live research projects. Such exposure makes students understand the intricacies of the research process and deepens their knowledge Do you assist students in placements, summer internships, and industry tours? Bennett University has a dedicated Career Services Centre that works closely with the industry to participate in guest lectures, curricular inputs, joint program development, internships, and placements. What are the future career options after pursuing BA Liberal Arts? BA Liberal Arts graduates can look for rewarding careers in advertising, public relations, financial analysis, design, journalism, publishing, corporate communications, marketing, etc., or start a successful entrepreneurial journey of their own. What kind of industry exposure do students have access to? This is one of the unique hallmarks of the BA Liberal Arts program as it benefits from faculty members teaching courses in management, which in turn, provides students an opportunity to continuously interact with industry experts from India and abroad. BA Global Film Tv and Web Series - Bennett University International Admissions Research Alumni Career Online Payment Library Student-Faculty Login BA Global – Film, TV & Web Series | BA Global - Mass Communication Study at University of Essex, UK Apply Now BA Global – Film, TV & Web Series | BA Global - Mass Communication Study at University of Essex, UK Apply Now BA Global - Film, TV & Web Series / Mass Communication (2+1) Immerse in the world of cinematic storytelling and global media expertise with the BA Global Film, TV, & Web Series, or B.A. Global - Mass Communication (2+1) program — transformative pathways designed to ignite creativity and launch dynamic careers. This brilliant Global Pathways Program at Bennett University offers the best of both worlds: a strong foundation at home, followed by an inspiring and exciting leap abroad, opening doors to global networks, diverse perspectives, and career opportunities in the ever-evolving media industry. The program allows students to study for the first two years at Bennett University, India, and the final year at the prestigious University of Essex, UK. With a globally recognized degree from the University of Essex, this program offers hands-on experience, industry exposure, and international learning opportunities that prepare students for the dynamic world of media and entertainment. Program Details Name Duration University Curriculum Highlights BA Global - Film, TV, & Web Series (2+1) BA Global - Mass Communication (2+1) 3 Years Years 1 & 2 at Bennett University , India Foundations in creative writing, drama, film studies, literary analysis, and performance arts Year 3 at University of Essex , UK Advanced coursework in creative writing, drama, film production, literature, and interdisciplinary electives Final Program Degree Based on specialization: BA Creative Writing, BA Drama, BA Drama and Creative Writing, BA Drama and Literature, BA Film and Creative Writing, BA Film and Drama, BA Film and Journalism, and BA Film Studies Program Objectives To provide students with an exposure to international education with real-world exposure. To develop critical thinking, leadership and entrepreneurship skills with global standards. To enhance career prospects in creative writing, film and drama or literature. Global Academic Experience Students gain international exposure by studying at globally recognized universities. Seamless Credit Transfer Academic programs are carefully mapped to ensure a smooth transition between institutions. Cost-Effective Pathway Students save on overall tuition and living costs compared to a full-length international program. Internationally Recognized Degree Graduates earn a degree from a reputed partner university, enhancing their global career prospects. Cultural and Professional Growth Exposure to diverse academic, cultural, and professional environments enriches personal and career development. ABOUT Why Choose BA Global - Film, TV & Web Series/ Mass Communication (2+1) Access to globally recognized business degrees from top university at UK. Internship and networking opportunities in India and the UK. Cultural and academic diversity, enriching students’ global perspectives. A vibrant, student-centric environment with excellent support for international students. By completing initial years in India, students can save up to INR 40-50 lakhs compared to completing a full degree abroad. Eligible for up to 2 years of post-study work permit. Partner University University of Essex, UK University of Essex, established in 1964, is a distinguished public research university located in Colchester, United Kingdom. Renowned for its commitment to pushing boundaries and fostering curiosity, Essex has built a reputation for academic excellence and innovative research. The university is recognized for research excellence in computer science, sociology, economics and econometrics, politics and international studies, modern languages and linguistics. Selection Process Selection will be based on Class XII Best of 3 subjects score (comprising of English as compulsory subject and any other two subjects with highest score) OUR ASK Frequently Asked Questions What is the Global Pathways Programme at Bennett University? The Global Pathways Programme (GPP) is an academic collaboration that allows students to complete the first two years of their BA Global - Film, TV & Web Series or Mass Communication at Bennett University and transfer to University of Essex, UK, for the remaining one year. What are the benefits of enrolling in this program? Internationally recognized degree from a top UK university. Cost-effective compared to completing full graduation abroad. Seamless credit transfer with a structured curriculum. Global exposure and cultural diversity by studying in both India and the UK. Post-study work permit in the UK for up to 1-2 years. What is the eligibility criterion for this program? Students must have: Passed XII standard from any recognised Education Board with minimum 60% marks (Class XII Best of 3 subjects score) and English as compulsory subject OR IB Board with minimum score of 24 credits, 3 Higher level and 3 standard level subjects. Student must comply with the English language proficiency requirements (IELTS/ TOEFL as per partner university guidelines). How does the 2+1 model work? Years 1 & 2: Study at Bennett University, India–Foundation courses. Years 3: Transfer to University of Essex, UK–Advanced coursework based on specialization. What degree will I receive after completing the program? You will be awarded a globally recognized degree in any one of the following from University of Essex, UK: BA Drama – Film, TV & Web and Mass Communication BA Drama and Creative Writing - Film, TV & Web and Mass Communication BA Drama and Literature - Film, TV & Web and Mass Communication BA Film and Creative Writing - Film, TV & Web and Mass Communication BA Film and Drama - Film, TV & Web and Mass Communication How much cost savings can I expect? By following the 2+1 model, students save approximately ₹40-50 lakhs, compared to completing all three years at University of Essex, UK. What career opportunities are available after this program? Opportunities in global companies. Eligibility for a U.K. post-study work permit for up to 1-2 years. Research & internship opportunities at University of Essex, UK How do I apply for the BA Global - Film, TV & Web Series/ Mass Communication (2+1) program? Applying to BA Global - Film, TV & Web Series/ Mass Communication (2+1) program at Bennet University is quick and easy. B.Com (Finance & Accounting) Eligibility, Fee, Curriculum, Career scope | Bennett University International Admissions Research Alumni Career Online Payment Library Student-Faculty Login Bachelor of Commerce (Finance & Accounting) Apply Now Bachelor of Commerce (Finance & Accounting) Apply Now About M.Tech Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning About B.Com (Finance & Accounting) The Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com) Finance & Accounting is a four-year, NEP 2020-aligned program that builds strong foundations in finance, accounting, taxation, and business analytics. Offered under the CBCS system with flexible entry and exit options, it blends academic rigour with practical industry exposure through live projects, financial simulations, and technology-enabled learning. Modelled on global standards from Harvard, IIMs, and LSE, the program emphasises experiential learning, analytical thinking, and ethical leadership, preparing students for careers in corporate finance, banking, auditing, and entrepreneurship. Duration 3 Years/4 Years (Hons./Hons. With Research) Specializations NA Credits 120 (3-Year) 160 (4-Year) Start Date Aug/Sep. 2026 (Tentative) Eligibility Criteria Indian Nationals: Passed XII standard from any recognised Education Board with English and Mathematics/Commerce & any other third subject with minimum 55% marks OR IB Board with minimum score of 24 credits, 3 Higher level and 3 standard level subjects. NRI: Pass with 55% aggrigate marks in grade 12th/ A level or equivalent and English language requirement (ELR) Selection Criteria Selection will be based on merit of Class XII Best of 3 subjects score (comprising of English and Maths/Commerce as compulsory subjects and any other third subject with highest score) B.Com (Finance & Accounting) Program Fee Get complete details of the B.Com (Finance & Accounting) program fee, including tuition, hostel, and other applicable charges. Click here for details. Why B.Com (Finance & Accounting) from Bennett University? NEP-Aligned Flexibility: Choice-based learning with multidisciplinary electives and skill enhancement courses. Industry-Driven Curriculum: Co-created with inputs from finance professionals, Big 4 experts, and industry bodies. Experiential & Project-Based Learning: Financial analytics labs, stock market simulations, and live consulting projects. Technology Integration: Hands-on training in ERP, SAP, Power BI, Tally Prime, Excel Modelling, and FinTech applications. Ethics and Leadership Development: Focus on managerial judgment, communication, and responsible financial decision-making. Career-Ready Skills: Strong foundation in accounting, auditing, taxation, investment analysis, and data-driven finance. Program Objectives The program aims to develop financially literate, analytically skilled, and ethically grounded professionals capable of driving organisational growth in a digital and globalised economy. It emphasises conceptual understanding, critical reasoning, and real-world problem-solving across finance and accounting domains. Learning Outcomes Graduates of this program will be able to demonstrate proficiency in financial and management accounting, apply quantitative and technological tools for financial decision-making, and interpret financial statements for strategic planning and investment. They will be equipped to integrate digital finance and data analytics into managerial and accounting functions while exhibiting leadership, ethical reasoning, and effective communication. The program also prepares students to pursue entrepreneurial ventures or continue advanced studies in finance and related disciplines. Curriculum Highlights Multidisciplinary Design: Incorporates core, elective, and skill enhancement courses from finance, analytics, and management. Financial Analytics Lab: Exposure to Bloomberg terminals, R, Python for finance, and digital dashboards. Capstone Consulting Project: Real-world problem-solving under industry mentorship. Professional Readiness Modules: Business communication, personal branding, and employability skills. Entrepreneurial Finance Track: Tailored for aspiring entrepreneurs and startup leaders. Research Component (Honours Year): Empirical or applied research in corporate finance, accounting innovation, or sustainability. Career Pathways Graduates are equipped for diverse global and domestic roles such as financial analyst, investment banker, equity research associate, auditor, tax consultant, financial controller, corporate finance manager, risk and treasury executive, wealth manager, financial planner, and business consultant. They can also pursue entrepreneurial pathways in FinTech or financial advisory services. Further education opportunities include MBA (Finance/Strategy), CFA, CPA, CMA (US), M.Sc. (Finance), and Ph.D. in Commerce & Management. MICA, Ahmedabad Dr. Ratan Kumar FPM - Management Development Institute, Gurgaon Ms. Anu Mohta Ph.d.(Thesis Submitted) - BHU Dr. Vijay Prakash Mishra Ph.D. - Gokhale Institute of Politics and Economics, Pune Mr. Krishan Ph.D. (Pursuing) - JNU, Delhi Mr. Abhishek Saran Ph.D.(Pursuing) - IIM, Sambalpur Ms. Priya Mandleshwar Ph.D. (Pursuing) - IIM, Indore Ms. Rimleena Boro Ph.D. (Pursuing) - IIM, Indore OUR ASK B.Com (Finance & Accounting) Frequently Asked Questions What is the duration and flexibility of B.Com Finance & Accounting program? It is a 3-year (Degree) or 4-year (Honours with Research) program under NEP’s multiple exit options. Is there flexibility to exit the B.Com Finance & Accounting program? Yes. The B.Com (Finance & Accounting) program at Bennett University offers flexible entry and exit options in line with NEP guidelines. Students can exit after the first year with a Certificate in Commerce (40 credits), after two years with a Diploma in Finance & Accounting (80 credits), after three years with a B.Com (Honours) in Finance & Accounting (120 credits), or after four years with a B.Com (Honours with Research) in Finance & Accounting (160 credits). How is B.Com (Finance & Accounting) different from a traditional B.Com? It integrates technology, analytics, and industry exposure aligned with NEP and global finance practices. Does the program include internships and projects? Yes, each student undertakes an internship or consulting project in their final year. What technology tools will I learn? ERP, SAP, Power BI, Tally Prime, Excel Modelling, Python/R for finance, and digital accounting software. Is global exposure part of the B.Com Finance & Accounting curriculum? Yes, through global immersion programs, expert lectures, and virtual international collaborations. Can I pursue certifications like CFA or CMA during the course? Yes, the curriculum complements professional certifications, with mentorship provided. What kind of placements can I expect after B.Com in Finance & Accounting? Opportunities in Big 4 firms, multinational banks, financial consultancies, and FinTech startups. Is it suitable for non-commerce students? Yes, Year 1 courses build a strong foundation for students from all academic backgrounds. What experiential learning opportunities are offered? Live stock market simulations, business valuation exercises, peer consulting, and financial case competitions. How is the program future-ready? By integrating financial technology, sustainability reporting, and data-driven decision-making for the digital era. Ph.D. in Computer Science Engineering - Bennett University International Admissions Research Alumni Career Online Payment Library Student-Faculty Login Bennett University’s Ph.D. program offers global exposure, academic integrity and technological excellence to the engineering researchers, with a motive to make them career-ready. The broad objectives of the Ph.D. programs are: to keep pace with the expanding frontiers of knowledge and to provide research training relevant to the present social and economic objectives of the country. The award of Ph.D. degree shall be in recognition of high academic achievements, independent research and application of knowledge to the solution of social, managerial, technical and scientific problems. Creative and productive inquiry shall be the basic concept underlying the research work. The academic program leading to the Ph.D. degree is broad-based. It involves specified course work and credit requirements for different programs, publications and a research thesis. The thesis shall be the report of research work characterized by either discovery of new facts or a new interpretation of known facts and theory, or an independent design and development, or development of new instrument/technology. The degree of Doctor of Philosophy (Ph.D.) of the Bennett University shall be conferred on a scholar who fulfill all the requirements specified in Ph.D. Ordinances and Regulations. The programs are available in the specialisations of Computer Science Engineering and Mathematics (Applied/Pure mathematics). Unique Differentiators of Ph.D. Program in Computer Science Engineering One to One interaction with faculty We envision doing multidisciplinary research We offer challanging problems to satisfy the enquisitive minds We have exchange programs with many International Universites There is an option of having co-supervisors from top universities in the world depending upon the merit of the candidate and available options Ph.D. Details Ph.D. Admissions Procedure and Schedule (Rolling basis) Ph.D. Application Process and Ph.D. Assistantship <!–p> For Detailed Ph.D. Admission Process & Requirement: Click Here </p–> Institute offers Ph.D. programme under following Categories Institute offers Ph.D. programme under following Categories Part-Time Ph.D. Sponsored Ph.D. Full Time Ph.D. with Assistantship Areas of Research Artificial Intelligence Blockchain Cyber Security Data Science Cloud Computing Drones Quantum Computing IoT and Robotics Augmented & Virtual Reality Augmented & Virtual Reality Eligibility As per UGC guidelines, a candidate passed B.Tech with a minimum of 7.5 CGPA or equivalent is eligible for Ph.D. Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning Research Area Expert(s):- Dr. Hiren Kumar Thakkar, Dr. Kuldeep; Post Graduate Certificate in Computer Science & Engineering, PG Certificate in CSE - Bennett University International Admissions Research Alumni Career Online Payment Library Student-Faculty Login POST GRADUATE CERTIFICATE IN CSE Unlocking the Power of Innovation and Technology-Based Interventions – Certificate in Computer Science Engineering Apply Now Why PGCCSE at Bennett University Work on Live industry projects State-of-the-art Infrastructure Industry-relevant Certifications Project-Based Experiential Learning ABOUT About Post Graduate Certificate in Computer Science & Engineering (PGCCSE) The six-month Post Graduate Certificate in Computer Science & Engineering (PGCCSE) Program prepares the students for the latest job roles in the industry. The certification program is suitable for engineering graduates to get industry ready. Also, this program is appropriate for working professionals who are interested in upgrading their skills, and keeping themselves relevant for the latest technology jobs. The students are offered various categories of courses, such as program core, specialisation core, specialisation elective, soft skills, and project-based learning. Duration 6 Months Specialisation 4 Credits 26 credits Start Date Jul/Aug 2025 (Tentative) Curriculum Details School of Computer Science Engineering and Technology has developed an industry focused curriculum for the PGCCSE program that equip the students to think critically, to have technical and specialisation skills, to be able to communicate effectively, and to work with teams: Soft Skills: A course on soft skills is offered to cultivate professional skills. Entrepreneurship: A course on entrepreneurship is offered to build start-up skills. Program Core Courses The core courses help students learn advanced concepts on data structures and algorithms, besides pick up practical skills essential to the chosen specialisations. Projects Project Based Learning (PBL): The students must take up one specialisation project. Specialisations Every specialisation comprises one core and one elective course. Besides, there will be a specialisation-oriented project that engages the students for project-based learning. Specialisations are chosen at the time of admission. Specialisation Core Courses: Students are offered one specialisation core course. Specialisation Electives: Students must choose one specialisation elective. Artificial Intelligence The CEOs and CXOs of NVIDIA, Aindra, Here Tech, Amazon, and other academicians have contributed to the curriculum design of the specialisation. The specialisation electives offered under AI are Cognitive Modelling, Advanced Computer Vision and Video Analytics, Reinforcement Learning, Image and Video Processing, and Natural Language Processing. These courses match the best of international standards in AI specialisation. The other high point is the arrangement the University has reached with NVIDIA, SAP, Hitachi and Times Internet to enable students to work on cutting-edge projects. Blockchain The curriculum for Blockchain specialisation has been developed in consultation with CEOs and CXOs of BankchainAsset.com, Digiledge, besides other subject matter experts. The specialisation electives offered as part of the B.Tech syllabus include Blockchain Technologies, Smart Contracts and Solidity Programming, Digital Currencies and Blockchain, Modern Cryptography, among others. Cyber Security With increased dependency on online transactions and other social activities, there is now high demand for a robust Cyber Security framework. Keeping that in mind, the Cyber Security curriculum has been designed by the CEOs and CXOs of the Data Security Council of India (DSCI), QoS Technologies, IBM, and other researchers. The courseware includes topics on Cyber Security with Blockchain, Malware Analysis for Mobile Devices, Security and Privacy for Big Data Analytics, Penetration Testing and Ethical Hacking, among others. Also, to have students work on cutting-edge projects, the University has tied-up with DSCI, Fortinet, CompTIA and CISCO. Data Science Data scientists play a key role in the working of smart cities, automation industry, BFSI and Fintech. Given the importance of Data Science, Bennett University has put together a curriculum with the help of CEOs and CXOs of Microsoft, Google, TCS, and other researchers. The curriculum includes elective courses on Structural Equation Modelling; Security and Privacy for Big Data Analytics; Data Visualisation; Big Data Analytics and Business Intelligence; and Satellite Data Analytics. Program Outcome Students will be able to identify, formulate and solve real life problems, and to understand the impact of the proposed solutions. Students will be able explore the latest technology and its applications. Students will be able deploy appropriate technology for the given tasks. Skills These are some advanced skills CSE students will acquire: Strong sense of professionalism Leadership Soft skill Ability to negotiate group discussions Public speaking We often organise: Personal interview workshops CV and cover letter workshops Networking events Social-media workshops Corporate & professional mentoring sessions for the benefit of students through our career cell. Labs Dell-EMC The lab consists of 32 Dell machines with the latest configuration. Moreover, it has the support of Dell-EMC. Dell provides support in faculty training, collaborative projects, and exclusive workshops. Specific areas of operation will include Information Storage and Management (“ISM”), Cloud Infrastructure Services (“CIS”), Data Science and Big Data Analytics (“DSBDA”) and Data Protection and Management (“DPM”). It will help the students to compete for the skills required by the fortune 500 companies. It incorporates information, resources, expertise, training, and knowledge in the field of (i) Information Storage and Management, (ii) Cloud Infrastructure Services, (iii) Data Protection and Management and (iv) Data Science and Big Data Analytics to enable Bennett University to disseminate the information and knowledge. Computer configuration: Dell OptiPlex 5050MT XCTO, Intel i5 processor, 8Gb DDR4 RAM. Bennett - NVIDIA Centre for Artificial Intelligence The Lab consists of 30 node Top-end HP Z440 Workstations. If you want to take your performance in computational processing to the next level, then this is the right choice. This is the right mix for executing your applications which are dealing with zeta scale data. Powerful graphics cards from NVIDIA and lightning-fast data transfers with thunderbolt technologies makes it a wonderful monster to work with. The lab gives you a world-class workstation experience that never slows you down. Our researchers and scholars are using this lab for AI applications in healthcare, security, cognition, text, image and video analysis. In the time to come, this centre will position itself as a leading centre of excellence for bringing a positive addition to the quality of life using AI. The NVIDIA DGX-1 V100 is the first system built with groundbreaking NVIDIA Pascal™-powered Tesla® V100 accelerators. It is NVIDIA NVLink™ implementation that delivers a massive increase in GPU memory capacity. This is the world’s first purpose-built system for deep learning and accelerated analytics, delivering performance equal to 500 conventional servers. It comes fully integrated with hardware, deep learning software, development tools, and runs popular accelerated analytics applications. This means you can immediately shorten data processing time, visualize more data, accelerate deep learning frameworks, and design more sophisticated neural networks. NVIDIA DGX-1 software stack includes major deep learning frameworks, the NVIDIA DIGITS™ GPU training system, the NVIDIA Deep Learning SDK (e.g. CuDNN, NCCL), NVIDIA Docker, GPU drivers, and NVIDIA CUDA® for rapidly designing deep neural networks (DNN). It’s the ideal stack for accelerating popular analytics and visualization software. This powerful system includes access to cloud management services for container creation and deployment, system updates, and an application repository. This combined software can run on Pascal-powered Tesla GPUs allowing applications to run 12X faster than with previous GPU-accelerated solutions. Due to our partnership with NVIDIA, we have access to Certified Expert Instructors, Worldwide Workshops, Online Courses, Epicenter of industry leaders, Onsite Training, Global Reach, NVIDIA Partner Network, OEMs and startups, Deep Learning Teaching Kit. The scope, capacity and potential of this are unlimited. Bennett is striving for cutting-edge research. It’s the ideal stack for accelerating popular analytics and visualization software. Access to cloud management services for container creation and deployment, system updates, and an application repository. Apple iMac Design & Multi-Media It is a futuristic 32 node high-end lab with state-of-the-art Apple machines. As per the International Standards the 27-inch monitors are useful for any visual effects with immersive experience by using most colorful retina display. Processor Speed, Magic Mouse and Magic keyboard makes the experience unforgettable. Lab is for running courses which require high end graphics capabilities including 3D graphics and video editing capabilities. it will be specifically used for activities and projects related to gaming, design, multimedia, modern art and media production. High configuration of the machines will also help in running resource-hungry applications related to research requiring large scale simulations and experimentation. This Centre will work in multimedia design and research. This Centre will be made of Apple iMacs which have very high-end graphics and other components suitable for multimedia research. We will have 32 machines of high configuration to serve the objectives of this lab. Approximate Cost: 75 Lacs Alexa Voice Tech Lab Programming Lab 10 in Numbers This Lab caters for imparting skills of Programming/Coding to First-Year Students. It has state of the art systems that are equipped with the requirements for programming instructions to be given to students. Computer configuration: HP ProDesk Micro tower PC, Inter®core™ 9500 processor,8Gb DDR4 RAM. Information Management System This Lab is for taking care of the curricular requirements of Information Management, Data Base Management systems and Other Business processing applications. It is equipped with relevant software and IT infrastructure to fulfil these requirements. Computer configuration: Acer, Intel®core™ i5 6400,64 Bit processor,8Gb RAM. Cloud Computing This Lab is for taking care of the curricular requirements of Cloud Computing processing and applications. Students get hands-on practical experience through lab work for novel Cloud-Based Computer Laboratory (CBCL) solutions, including certifications like Microsoft Azure etc. It is equipped with relevant software and IT infrastructure to fulfil these requirements. Drone Labs This Lab is for taking care of the curricular requirements in the domain of Drone base Lab, assembling Drones and implementing the applications. Our Drone Laboratory provides facilities for the development of various drone technologies and sensing equipment which could be applied to the drones using DJI Mavic AIR QUADCOPTER DRONE, Veerobot F450 AIR QUADCOPTER DRONE and many more different drones and technologies. Students use Jetson Nano Nvidia Development Kit, Raspberry Pi etc. The laboratory is equipped with various drone platforms: from quad/hexacopters to pipeline crawlers, to remotely operated underwater vehicles. IoT and Robotics This Lab is for taking care of the curricular requirements of IoT and Robotics Lab, hands-on experience with our Robo NAO and implementing the applications with NAO V6 HUMANOID ROBOT. Our students build an Artificial Being (ABe), which, unlike humanoid robots, is a congregation of networked mobile robots emulating the various parts/organs of a body in this lab. Computer Network and Cyber Security This Lab is for taking care of the curricular requirements of Computer Network and Cyber Security Lab on Simulator Tools, including Hardware hand on experience with Routers and the latest CISCO Switches. Students use different wireless network components and features providing network security and to set Firewall Security in windows/ Linux OS for implementing different types of vulnerabilities for hacking websites /Web Applications. Data Structure This Lab is for taking care of the curricular requirements in the domain of Data Structure Labs. We provide the students with knowledge about Data Structures, Applications of data structures, Problem-solving using data structure tools and Techniques. Students are made familiar with C programming and its applications. AR and VR Gaming This Lab is for taking care of the curricular requirements in the domain of AR and VR Gaming Labs. Our Virtual Reality, Augmented Reality, and Media Lab contains some of the most cutting-edge head- mounted displays available today. Students have access to the technology for the development of VR and AR software using Oculus Go Standalone Virtual Realty Headset and many other. Microprocessor This Lab is for taking care of the curricular requirements in the domain of Microprocessing Lab to provide intensive practical exposure to learn the assembly and embedded C programming systematically for the different issues of microprocessors and implement their codes on INTEL ALTERA DE2 115 DEVELOPMENT AND EDUCATION Boards. Big Data and Machine Learning This Lab is for taking care of the curricular requirements in the domain of Big Data Machine Learning and Artificial Intelligence to analyze large datasets, identify trends, and develop predictive models to solve their problems. Where students build and train deep neural networks, build a CNN and apply it to detection and recognition tasks, Train test sets, analyze variance for DL applications, use standard techniques and optimization algorithms, and build neural networks in TensorFlow. Students can Build and train RNNs, work with NLP and Word Embeddings, and use HuggingFace tokenizers and transformer models to perform NER. Quantum Computing This Lab is for taking care of the curricular requirements in the domain of Quantum Computing Lab, for research uses and quantum theory to develop computer technology. Using quantum simulations this lab provides hands-on exercises that execute on real quantum systems provided by IBM Quantum Experience. BU PROUD 450+ Companies for Placements 1.37 Cr/Yr. CSE Batch: 2018-2022 OUR ASK PGCCSE Frequently Asked Questions What are the different specialisations I can opt in PGCCSE? Bennett University offers PGCCSE in: Artificial Intelligence Data Science Cyber Security BlockChain What is the eligibility criteria for PGCCSE? A Bachelor’s degree in Engineering/ Technology/ Architecture or equivalent of MCA/ MIT/ MSc, with minimum 50% marks Why should a student pursue Engineering Programs at Bennett University? There are many reasons to join Bennett University: Industry-focused 40+ high-end labs PhD faculty from globally acclaimed institutions Student get industry-ready within six months. Students pick up a specialisation within six months Students get an opportunity to work on live projects with industry experts. What is the selection process of PGCCSE? Selection is based on the results of an interview or based on the graduation score. What are the prospects for students pursing Post Graduate Certificate in Computer Science Engineering from BU? After completing PGCCSE program from BU, the students become entitled to apply for: Jobs in the corporate sector Entrepreneurship opportunities What are the career opportunities after PGCCSE? The course is designed for those who wants to learn Computer Engineering within a short span. After the course, students can become Project Managers, Machinery Managers, Senior Engineers, Maintenance Engineers, Software Developer Research Associates, Design Engineers, Solution Integrators, Network Administrators, Database Administrators, Software Testers, Domain Consultants, Industry Officers (Technical), System Engineers, Team Leads/ Architects, and Technology Analysts. School of Global Pathways - Bennett University International Admissions Research Alumni Career Online Payment Library Student-Faculty Login School of Global Pathways Your gateway to a global future School of Global Pathways Your gateway to a global future ABOUT About School of Global Pathways The School of Global Pathways opens its doors to ambitious minds with global aspirations, inviting students to embark on a transformative academic journey that spans continents and cultures. With a mission to redefine the boundaries of higher education, the school promotes cross-cultural dialogue, challenges geographic limitations, and fosters an environment where academic excellence meets a global perspective. In line with this vision, the School of Global Pathways aims to equip future professionals with the international exposure and adaptability required to thrive in an interconnected world through meaningful, immersive, and career-expanding opportunities. The School of Global Pathways is established to address the growing demand for global exposure, international credentials, and cross-cultural competencies. It offers structured educational pathways that combine the foundation of home-country learning with the enriching experience of overseas education. Through multi-country programs, student mobility initiatives, and internship and exchange opportunities, the school enables students to progress to world-ranked partner universities across the UK, USA, Europe, and other global destinations. Through these offerings, the School of Global Pathways prepares graduates with diverse educational experiences, cultural intelligence, adaptability, and a strong global mindset, empowering them to build successful careers without borders. Gain the Global Edge International-Degree Advantage Earn degrees from both Bennett University and international partners. Global Career Mobility Access job markets across India and your host country. Curated University Partnerships Study at prestigious partner institutions with proven academic excellence. Cost-Effective International Education Access world-class international education at a fraction of the cost of a complete four-year overseas program. Learning Beyond Boudiaries Dean’s Message Prof. (Dr.) Abhay Bansal Dean, School of Global Pathways Dean, Office of International Affairs Dean, School of Computer Science Engineering & Technology On behalf of Bennett University, it is my privilege to welcome you to the School of Global Pathways, a transformative new venture designed to centralise and elevate the international aspirations of our student body. As Dean, I am proud to lead this initiative, which now serves as the unified umbrella for all foreign exchange and global mobility programs across every existing school at the university. The School of Global Pathways operates with a singular mission: to facilitate the process for students who wish to pursue or continue their education abroad from the very start of their academic journey. We recognise that true holistic development often requires exposure to diverse educational methodologies and cultures. Leveraging our robust foundation of over 120 collaborations with world-ranked institutions—including Georgia Tech, UC Berkeley, the University of British Columbia, and the National University of Singapore – we provide a structured ecosystem for credit transfers, exchange programs, and joint research projects. By integrating the best practices of the New Education Policy with deep industry and academic interaction, we aim to mould our students into "world citizens" ready to contribute to society's growth on a global scale. We are here to support your ambitions every step of the way. The School of Global Pathways is your gateway to a successful international career, ensuring your time at Bennett University is both rewarding and the launchpad for a borderless future.
